products.heroDesc: Powered by proprietary IoT technology with precise temperature and time control for efficient, standardized cooking. Our products cover multi-grid cooking machines, mini cooking machines, stir-fry masters, and unmanned retail cabinets.
products.demoDesc: Multi-Grid Smart Cooking Machine - Cook 9 dishes in 3 minutes
products.notFoundDesc: We provide customized smart catering equipment solutions tailored to your specific requirements.
products.browserNotSupport: Your browser does not support video playback

product1.name: ChefMate 360 Multi-Grid Smart Cooking Machine
product1.desc: Cook 9 dishes simultaneously in 3 minutes with 360° flipping that replicates chef tossing techniques
features: Smokeless and self-cleaning, lower operating costs
product1.suitable: Chain restaurants, corporate canteens, fast-food restaurants
product1.fullDesc: The ChefMate 360 Multi-Grid Smart Cooking Machine is Shuwei Tech's flagship product, using proprietary IoT technology with precise temperature and time control for efficient, standardized cooking. It can cook 9 dishes simultaneously in 3 minutes, dramatically improving serving efficiency and reducing labor costs.
allFeatures: 3/6/9/12 grid configurations for different scale needs
360° flipping replicates chef tossing technique for better taste
Smokeless and self-cleaning, reducing operating costs
Cloud recipe synchronization with continuous updates
One-button start, simple operation, no professional chef needed
IoT remote monitoring, real-time device status
Auto-cleaning function, saving manual cleaning time

product2.name: CookMate 360 Smart Mini Cooking Machine
product2.desc: Precise temperature control curve, delicious meals in 3 minutes, suitable for multiple scenarios
features: Sheet metal and premium engineering plastic housing
product2.suitable: Office buildings, convenience stores, campus canteens
product2.fullDesc: The CookMate 360 Smart Mini Cooking Machine is designed for office buildings and convenience stores. Compact yet powerful, it supports scan-to-order with 3-minute fast serving, making it ideal for quick-service scenarios.
allFeatures: High-precision temperature and time control for consistent quality
Sheet metal and premium engineering plastic housing, durable and attractive
Small footprint, ideal for limited spaces
Low noise design, won't affect office environment
Smart heat preservation, keeps food at optimal temperature

product3.name: StirMaticX Stir-Fry Master
product3.desc: Sequential raw ingredient feeding for optimal cooking timing
features: Sequential raw ingredient feeding for golden timing
Turn beginners into chefs with built-in recipe library
product3.fullDesc: The StirMaticX Stir-Fry Master features innovative sequential raw ingredient feeding technology, precisely controlling when each ingredient enters the wok, replicating traditional wok heat control. Ideal for catering scenarios with higher quality requirements.
allFeatures: Sequential raw ingredient feeding for optimal timing
Turn beginners into chefs with built-in recipe library
Smart stirring, no manual intervention needed
Simulates traditional wok heat for better taste

product4.name: Instachef Unmanned Food Retail Cabinet
product4.desc: 24/7 unmanned fresh cooking, 108-meal storage, 48 meals/hour output
features: No plumbing restrictions, compliant for malls and hospitals
product4.fullDesc: The Instachef Unmanned Food Retail Cabinet is an innovative product for new retail scenarios, achieving 24/7 unmanned operation. The main unit stores 108 meals with 48 meals/hour capacity, offering flexible placement and fast return on investment.
allFeatures: No plumbing restrictions, compliant for malls and hospitals
Smart inventory management with auto-restock alerts

product5.name: Fully Automatic Coffee Machine C1
product5.desc: Italian-style freshly ground espresso, 30-second quick serve
product5.fullDesc: The Fully Automatic Coffee Machine C1 uses an Italian imported pump for authentic freshly ground espresso with 30-second serving. Precise temperature control at ±1°C ensures consistent quality in every cup.
allFeatures: Italian-style freshly ground espresso, rich flavor
Large capacity bean hopper and water tank

product6.name: Smart Automatic Egg Fryer E1
product6.desc: Auto crack and pour, smart temperature control with auto-flip
product6.fullDesc: The Smart Automatic Egg Fryer E1 is designed for breakfast scenarios. It automatically cracks and pours eggs with smart temperature control and auto-flip. Supports soft-boiled, hard-boiled, and omelette modes, making it ideal for hotel breakfast areas.
allFeatures: Auto crack and pour, hands-free operation

about.heroDesc: Founded in 2017, Shuwei Tech is a national high-tech enterprise focused on R&D and sales of smart catering equipment robots. We are committed to transforming the traditional catering industry through technological innovation, driving intelligent upgrades, and bringing smart cooking to every restaurant and every home.
about.missionDesc: Automating user behavior through technology to drive smart catering transformation. Making healthy and delicious food accessible, and giving every catering equipment a smart brain.
about.visionDesc: To become the world's leading smart catering equipment provider, building a complete product matrix covering stir-frying, boiling, pan-frying, grilling and more. Bringing smart kitchens to every restaurant and every home.
about.timelineDesc: From rapid growth to steady progress, we keep moving forward

milestones.2017: Company founded, began smart catering equipment R&D
milestones.2019: Multi-Grid series launched, solving chain standardization challenges
milestones.2021: Completed Series A funding, expanded production capacity
milestones.2023: Products exported overseas, global expansion initiated
milestones.2026: Launched next-generation smart kitchen integrated solution

about.rdDesc: Located in Foshan, Shunde, Guangdong, with modern production lines. Over 220 domestic patent applications filed. A team of 50+ top engineers empowering traditional catering with technology.
about.foodDesc: Dual R&D centers in East and South China, factories spanning 2000+ sqm, covering ten major cuisines. Led by star chefs and food engineers with 12 rigorous processes ensuring food safety.
about.valuesDesc: These values guide every decision and action we take
about.value1Desc: Continuous R&D investment with technological innovation as our core competitiveness
about.value2Desc: Deeply understanding customer needs to deliver solutions that exceed expectations
about.value3Desc: Craftsmanship in creating high-quality products and services
about.value4Desc: Growing together with partners to build a win-win ecosystem
about.honor1Title: 2021 China Golden Flame Award Gold Supplier
about.honor1Sub: CCH International Franchise Exhibition Organizing Committee
about.honor2Sub: CCH International Franchise Exhibition Organizing Committee
about.honor3Title: Guangdong Catering Service Industry Association Takeaway Committee
about.teamDesc: An experienced professional team safeguarding your catering business
about.team1Desc: 15 years of smart hardware experience, former R&D Director at a leading home appliance company
about.team2Desc: Robotics expert, Ph.D. from Tsinghua University, leading the team to 220+ patents
about.team3Desc: 10 years of catering operations experience, providing smart solutions for multiple chain brands
about.team4Desc: Senior product manager, expert in user research and interaction design, leading the design of multiple hit products
